flashcards.definition: Shows the decay of a nucleus: the sum of mass numbers and atomic numbers must balance.
Conversion of one element into another through nuclear reactions.
Total mass numbers equal on both sides; total atomic numbers equal on both sides.
A proton converts to a neutron, emitting a positron (e⁺); atomic number decreases by 1.
An inner electron is captured by the nucleus; a proton becomes a neutron.
